positive: A collection of cute, simple vector illustrations of forest animals (sloth, mushroom, squirrel, fox) interacting in a whimsical woodland scene. The style must be flat design, sticker-friendly, with thick outlines and a limited, pastel color palette. Kawaii aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, shadows
